events.description: An intimate, two-day gathering for clinical research executives and thought leaders focusing on how advanced data strategies and artificial intelligence are transforming clinical research. Two concurrent programs: AI and Data for Clinical Trial Optimization, and AI Strategy and Business Value in Clinical Development. Topics include integrating diverse data sources, AI-ready data strategies, AI for trial design and monitoring, agentic AI for clinical trials, and AI governance and ethics.
